name: [PARENT-01/02/03/14/16/17/22/24/25 + QA-08] Complete parent/family branch coverage
description: The family-mode parent rows passed through seeded/source coverage, but child notification, rate-limit, nudge, clone, drill-down, and blocked-gate branches were not forced live.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deterministic browser/unit coverage for PARENT-01, PARENT-02, PARENT-03, PARENT-14, PARENT-16, PARENT-17, PARENT-22, PARENT-24, PARENT-25, and QA-08. Cover parent home hub essentials; >=2 child family summary; child detail progress/session drill-down and URL mode defaults; Learn This Too clone; nudge rate limit by recipient child across senders; child curriculum overview; family-route blocked gate and switch CTA; parent-home ambient household-pulse/ParentTransitionNotice variants; progress-tab nudge CTA opening NudgeActionSheet; and add-child regression. Prefer seeded scenarios and request interception over live notification delivery. Update the flow-plan rows with evidence and final status.
riskImpact: P1 family-mode coverage gap: parent home, multi-child dashboards, child drill-down, Learn This Too, nudges, child curriculum, and family-route guards are primary guardian workflows in V2. Regressions can make the family shell unusable for guardians even when basic home rendering still passes.
